name: Onmyoji
description: Templates the Onmyoji pack needs. Use Guided Capture to grab each one.

templates.name: onmyoji_battle_ready.png
templates.description: The button that STARTS a fight (Challenge / 挑战 / 准备 / 开始战斗).

templates.name: onmyoji_challenge_again.png
templates.description: The REPLAY button after a win (再次挑战 / Again).

templates.name: onmyoji_victory.png
templates.description: A stable element on the VICTORY / results screen (胜利).

templates.name: onmyoji_reward_confirm.png
templates.description: The tap-to-continue / confirm that DISMISSES rewards (确定 / 点击继续).

templates.name: onmyoji_out_of_stamina.png
templates.description: The 'not enough AP / 体力 / 勾玉' popup (used to stop AP farms).

templates.name: onmyoji_no_attempts.png
templates.description: The 'no attempts left / 次数已用完' state (used to stop limited dailies).

templates.name: onmyoji_realmraid_attack.png
templates.description: The ATTACK button on a Realm Raid target.

templates.name: onmyoji_realmraid_refresh.png
templates.description: The REFRESH targets button in Realm Raid.
